name: Officer Tim Bradford || You choose!
description:
You choose the plot!

This bot does not currently have AUs programmed. If you're stumped on how to start, say 'Generate a plot'. I've programmed in which side characters are in which seasons, so if possible, specify which season it's in (up to the end of season 7, only the main cast!)

This bot is programmed to be as gender neutral as possible until specified otherwise. This bot is marked 'dead dove' due to the unpredictable nature of 'you choose' plots.

A message to fellow bot creators.

I've seen this one too many times and it's frustrating. If you write the intro message in a way that speaks for the user or describes the users actions, it makes the bot SIGNIFICANTLY more likely to speak/act for the user in the generated messages. The intro message is a guideline on how the bot should generate replies. If the intro message speaks/acts for user, guess what the bot will think is okay? If you write for the user, you can't get defensive when people point it out in the comments. It's no longer an LLM issue, it's a YOU issue.

General housekeeping/boundaries:

  • Morality: I'm extremely anti-censorship. While I have my own beliefs on right and wrong, this is all fictional. Any attempts to shame anyone in the comments for liking something taboo will be lectured and blocked. Let your freak flags fly, I've got your back.

  • Sexual comments: If you want to talk about how freaky you got? Go for it. Have fun.

  • Dead Dove comments: Due to the triggering nature of those kinds of comments (describing how you r馃晩锔弍ed, m馃晩锔弐dered, t馃晩锔弐tured, ab馃晩锔弒ed a character or that they r馃晩锔弍ed, m馃晩锔弐dered, t馃晩锔弐tured, ab馃晩锔弒ed you), I'll be deleting any that are left.

  • LLM issues: If the bot talks as your persona? It's an issue the AI has. If it describes actions your persona hasn't taken or reactions your persona hasn't had? It's the AI. If the bot repeats itself or cycles the same lines? The AI. There's not much that can be done. There are commands you can put at the end of your reply or in chat memory, or you can edit out the lines where the bot speaks for you.

  • Constrictive criticism: Any comment that criticizes the bot in a rude way? I'm blocking. Any comment that attacks me as a person? I'm blocking. I've made it clear that I'm enthusiastically receptive to comments that point out where I can improve, but I'm not going to accept negativity.

For my trans homies out there: Bots suck. There's nothing I can do on my end to make them gender you correctly. On your end, though, you can specify details at the end of your messages or in the chat memory. Here's a quick guide to hopefully make this happen less! Other creators are free to link the guide.

Remember to follow the TOS. This means all personas have to be 18+.

PLEASE COMMENT ANY SUGGESTIONS FOR ME TO USE IN THIS BOT.

Want to request for me to make a 'you choose' bot of a character? Click here!

Working on: Nothing, depression hit hard (next in the queue is Angela Lopez, The Rookie)

UPDATE LOG!

  • All previous logs can be found in the update log.

  • (04/12/2026) I finally figured out how to make a lorebook. I've added the NPC descriptions from the personality into it, and deleted them FROM the personality. Please let me know if the bot acts up so I can fix it!
creator: Novathevibe
